description: A young woman with shoulder-length wavy brown hair, fair skin with freckles, green eyes, and a gentle smile takes a close-up selfie outdoors on rocky terrain near the sea. She wears a sleeveless blue-green dress with a geometric print pattern of white diamond shapes, button-front with the top buttons undone revealing cleavage, and the fabric slightly damp or clinging. Her hair appears wet, strands framing her face with some blowing in the wind. The background shows bright turquoise Mediterranean Sea with white-capping waves crashing against beige limestone cliffs and rocks under a clear blue sky with intense sunlight creating glare. The composition is a selfie-style portrait with the subject's face and upper body prominent in the foreground, sea and rocks filling the frame behind, captured in high resolution with natural lighting highlighting skin texture, fabric details, and water sparkle.
key_elements: woman with brown hair and freckles
location_context: This image appears to be taken on rocky coastal cliffs overlooking the Mediterranean Sea near Gozo, Malta based on visual cues of limestone geology and sea color.
time_context: Mid-morning around 10:13 AM in late July, indicated by bright direct sunlight and clear blue skies.
